field.label: IP Address
field.help: IP address or network to add to whitelist (CIDR format supported)

field.label: Description
field.help: Description or comment for this whitelist entry

field.label: Permanent Entry
field.help: Make this a permanent whitelist entry (unchecked entries will expire)

field.label: Expiry Date
field.help: Expiry date for temporary entries (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format, leave empty for permanent)
